chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-6206/2024 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For order on Misc. No.27578/2024 2. For order on office objection No.1. 3. For order on Misc. No.27579/2024 4. For hearing of main case. 11.12.2024 Mr. Samiullah advocate alongwith petitioner Syeda Monazza Kazmi................ 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Admittedly petitioner/applicant being accused in FIR No.1/2020, under sections 161, 409, 465, 467, 477, 477-A, 34 PPC read with section 5 of Prevention of Corruption Act, PS ACE Thatta, was on interim bail granted by the trial court however due to absence on one date of hearing, trial court dismissed the bail application in non-prosecution and merits were not considered. Accordingly, without prejudice to the merits of the case, protective bail for ten days from today is granted to the petitioner subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. Petitioner would be at liberty to file pre-arrest bail application afresh or submit application for restoration of earlier bail application before trial court. J U D G E J U D G E IK
